title: 📊 Docs Eval Report - 2026-03-05
body:
# 📊 Documentation Evaluation Report

**Run ID**: 20260305-162756
**Timestamp**: 2026-03-05T16:27:56.266768+00:00
**Total Evaluations**: 300
**Servers**: foundry-docs-vnext, foundry-docs, microsoft-learn, mintlify-hosted
**Models**: claude-opus-4.6, gpt-5.3-codex, gemini-3-pro-preview

---

## Scoreboard: Server × Model Matrix

| Server | claude-opus-4.6 | gemini-3-pro-preview | gpt-5.3-codex | Average |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MS Learn (Control A) 🥇 | 0.933 | 0.882 | 0.906 | **0.908** |
| Mintlify MCP (Control B) 🥈 | 0.949 | 0.868 | 0.905 | **0.908** |
| FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) 🥉 | 0.927 | 0.879 | 0.912 | **0.906** |
| FastMCP docs/ (Control C) | 0.924 | 0.860 | 0.931 | **0.904** |


---

## Hypothesis Testing

### H1: docs-vnext (treatment) outperforms docs/ (control C)

**Result**: ⚠️ MARGINAL — FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) (0.906) vs FastMCP docs/ (Control C) (0.904), delta = +0.002

### H2: Custom FastMCP outperforms Mintlify built-in MCP

**Result**: ❌ REJECTED — FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) (0.906) vs Mintlify MCP (Control B) (0.908), delta = -0.002

### H3: Custom FastMCP outperforms Microsoft Learn

**Result**: ❌ REJECTED — FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) (0.906) vs MS Learn (Control A) (0.908), delta = -0.002

### H4: Results are consistent across all 3 models

**Result**: ⚠️ MIXED

- **claude-opus-4.6**: Mintlify MCP (Control B) > MS Learn (Control A) > FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) > FastMCP docs/ (Control C)
- **gemini-3-pro-preview**: MS Learn (Control A) > FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) > Mintlify MCP (Control B) > FastMCP docs/ (Control C)
- **gpt-5.3-codex**: FastMCP docs/ (Control C) > FastMCP docs-vnext/ (Treatment) > MS Learn (Control A) > Mintlify MCP (Control B)



---

## Category Breakdown

| Category | FastMCP docs/ ( | FastMCP docs-vn | MS Learn (Contr | Mintlify MCP (C |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| agent-development | 0.962 | 0.971 | 0.931 | 0.964 |
| getting-started | 0.867 | 0.887 | 0.869 | 0.867 |
| infrastructure-security | 0.918 | 0.927 | 0.927 | 0.927 |
| observability-evaluation | 0.829 | 0.802 | 0.905 | 0.853 |
| sdk-api | 0.947 | 0.947 | 0.905 | 0.927 |


---

## Methodology

Each evaluation scenario poses a real-world Microsoft Foundry documentation question to a frontier model,
providing only one MCP server's tools. Responses are scored on:

| Metric | Weight | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Completeness | 40% | % of required concepts mentioned in response |
| Quality | 30% | Whether response includes code examples, step-by-step instructions, prerequisites |
| Doc Retrieval | 30% | Whether the model found and referenced expected documentation pages |

**Composite score** = 0.4 × completeness + 0.3 × quality + 0.3 × doc_retrieval

---

*Generated by `scripts/eval_report.py` — foundry-docs evaluation harness*
